basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Indore. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree in Basic Science or Graduate/Post Graduate Degree Or Graduation
qualification.details: PG Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET or GATE or National level examinations by Central Government Departments. Candidates from Biomedical Engineering/ Biotechnology/ Biosciences and Bioengineering/ Materials Science and Materials Engineering/ Mechanical/ Electrical Engineering with first division. Valid GATE scorecard required (exempted if CSIR-UGC NET qualified). Minimum 60% or equivalent from Graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
